title: Spy Vs. Spy: The Music Of Ornette Coleman
notes:
Recorded August 18 and 19, 1988 at Power Station, New York City.
Mixed October 18 and 19, 1988 at B.C. Studio, Brooklyn, New York.

Tim Berne is heard in the left channel. 
John Zorn is heard in the right channel.

Ⓟ 1989 Elektra/Asylum/Nonesuch Records

℗ & © 1989 Elektra/Asylum/Nonesuch Records for the United States and WEA International Inc. for the world outside of the United States.

Same as '[r6751752]' except disc print.

videos.description:
Ornette Coleman's Word for Bird, new reindition by John Zorn.
Set to Stanley Kubrick's A Clockwork Orange.

I can't belive there isn't any Spy vs. Spy material on youtube. I mean seriously!
Even for Zorn, that album is beyond wild.
